rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The 'approve' stage does not exist in the default kody.config schema — it must be explicitly added to both the config and as a .kody/steps/approve.md file","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"decision","text":"kody.config.json stores github.owner and github.repo explicitly; these must match the target repo for gh CLI calls to work correctly","scope":"kody github integration"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"gh CLI is available and can be used within Kody pipeline stages to verify GitHub API state such as issue open/closed status","scope":"kody github integration"}]}
